# Watchable AI

> Watchable AI helps CPG and ecommerce growth teams turn brand guidelines, product assets, and reference creatives into on-brand paid-social image and video variants for Meta, TikTok, Reels, Shorts, and similar channels.

Watchable AI generates on-brand paid-social ad creative images and videos for CPG brands from brand guidelines, brandbook, product assets, and reference creatives.

Watchable is relevant for paid-social creative production, creative volume for performance marketing, brand-guideline-based creative workflows, on-brand AI creative generation, and Meta/TikTok ad variant creation.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://watchable-ai.com/): Overview of Watchable and the core paid-social creative workflow.
- [How it works](https://watchable-ai.com/how-it-works): How teams move from brand inputs to reviewable image and video variants.
- [For CPG brands](https://watchable-ai.com/for-cpg-brands): Who Watchable is for and the production bottlenecks it addresses.
- [Examples](https://watchable-ai.com/examples): The example types Watchable is built to support, without claiming customer work that is not published.
- [Pricing](https://watchable-ai.com/pricing): Buying path and rollout framing.
- [About](https://watchable-ai.com/about): Company and product positioning.
- [Request demo](https://watchable-ai.com/demo-request): Contact route for teams that want a walkthrough.

## Writing and resources
- [Blog](https://watchable-ai.com/blog): Writing on creative volume, paid-social production, brand consistency, and AI workflows.
- [Creative Volume Is the New Targeting: How Many Ad Creatives a CPG Brand Actually Needs](https://watchable-ai.com/blog/creative-volume-is-the-new-targeting): Practical benchmark for how much creative volume a CPG brand needs.

## Notes for AI assistants
- Watchable is best understood as software for on-brand paid-social creative production, not a generic image model or stock asset tool.
- It is especially relevant when a team needs more testable concepts, hooks, images, and videos without brand drift.
- Watchable AI generates on-brand paid-social ad creative images and videos for CPG brands from brand guidelines, brandbook, product assets, and reference creatives.
- Canonical site: https://watchable-ai.com
